com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier

Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide

    BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier.isNegative()
    Deprecated.
    the actual value is always positive
    BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier.isNotNegative()
    Deprecated.
    the actual value is always positive
    BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier.isNotPositive()
    Deprecated.
    the actual value is always positive
    BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier.isNotZero()
    Deprecated.
    the actual value is always positive
    BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier.isPositive()
    Deprecated.
    the actual value is always positive
    BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier.isZero()
    Deprecated.
    the actual value is always positive
    BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier BigDecimalVerifier.precision()
    Returns a verifier for BigDecimal.precision().

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    BigDecimalVerifier BigDecimalVerifier.precision​(Consumer<BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.
